title: 05.06.2026 — Nika, Day 1
paragraphs: The morning was once again filled with much bustle. Breakfasts, errands for provisions. In all, we cast off around 17:00. We hoisted the sails rather swiftly; the wind was pleasant, entirely in our favor. Our "daily routine" commenced. Sasha explained the meaning of the navigational marks to me anew. We calibrated the autopilot - it performed flawlessly. We drank pu'er tea. Conversed. Prepared lunch and dinner. Smoked.

I volunteered for the night watch. Truth be told, I claimed all the night watches for myself. It is my most beloved time! The crew slumbers, and I am left one-on-one with the Sea. I spoke with It. I offered It my gratitude. I marveled at Its glassy surface amidst the white nights.
Around three o'clock, Sanya awoke, and we began preparations to moor in Muhu. Muhu is a ballad all its own! I have, in truth, fallen in love with Estonia, but with Muhu most especially)
